error_signature: data of the previously logged-in user in the preview mode
title: Data from previous user persists in preview mode
symptom: When switching users in preview mode, data from the previous user is still visible. Edited data also appears blank until the data is reloaded.
applies_when: Using the same browser for multiple user logins
Collection is set to preserve data on navigation
not_this_if: Using different browsers for each user
root_cause: The collection's default setting to preserve data on navigation causes the application to retain the previous user's data, leading to confusion when switching users without reloading.
fix_steps: Access the collection settings in your WeWeb project
Disable the option to preserve data on navigation
Test by logging in with different users to confirm the fix
agent_instruction: Disable the preserve data on navigation option in the collection settings.
